finding_results.evidence: Grep of revised file shows 3 surviving instances of 'specific', zero 'particular'. Only 1 is the formula pattern: 'a specific one' at chapters/chapter_11.md:5 (functional disambiguation). The other 2 are predicate-adjective uses: 'glassy and specific' at chapters/chapter_11.md:19 and 'real and populated and specific' at chapters/chapter_11.md:141. All 18 formula-pattern instances from the original draft were addressed: 17 cut, 1 retained (L5). Representative cuts: 'the particular shine' replaced with 'wet eyes and a lifted chin' at chapters/chapter_11.md:31; 'the particular quality of the overhead light' simplified to 'The overhead light' at chapters/chapter_11.md:19; 'that specific New York winter cold' to 'that New York winter cold' at chapters/chapter_11.md:247; 'the specific, surgical phrase' to 'the surgical phrase' at chapters/chapter_11.md:269.
finding_results.notes: Cut 17 of 18 formula-pattern instances. The sole survivor ('a specific one' at L5) passes the acceptance test: removing 'specific' would make the referent ambiguous — the sentence contrasts edge cases generally with one in particular. The 2 predicate-adjective uses ('glassy and specific', 'real and populated and specific') are a different syntactic pattern from the targeted 'the particular/specific [noun] of/that...' formula and do not function as precision-marker filler.

finding_results.evidence: Passage 1 (bathroom stall reflection): thesis statement 'Not because she was becoming more honest, but because the performance was eating the performer' cut at chapters/chapter_11.md:77 — paragraph now ends on 'the distance between that woman and the one she performed was getting smaller every week.' Passage 2 (aimed wound): cascading proof chain cut at chapters/chapter_11.md:237 — paragraph now ends on 'the wound had landed exactly where she'd aimed — in the part of Nora that feared being too much.' Passage 3 (forgiveness chain): retained at chapters/chapter_11.md:273 as the single allowed explicit analysis — 'because Nora always forgave, because forgiveness was another one of her excesses, and her excesses were the reason this worked, and the reason this worked was the reason it was unforgivable.'
finding_results.notes: Two of three passages now end on concrete scene evidence without authorial thesis. The bathroom passage ends on the unnamed distance between selves (the preceding sentences demonstrate the performance-eating-performer dynamic without stating it). The aimed-wound passage ends on the landed blow (the irony of knowledge-as-love-as-weapon is implied by the scene's rendering of Simone choosing the phrase she knows will hurt most). The forgiveness chain is retained as the one allowed analysis per the acceptance test; its rhythmic structure earns its place as chapter-closing thematic compression.

finding_results.evidence: Bathroom scene compression at chapters/chapter_11.md:63-65: AI-autonomy digression reduced from 3 paragraphs to 2 sentences ('The AI had generated that — not Simone. She'd written the parameters, but the words were the system's own.'). Three short urgency sentences added: 'The dashboard loaded.' (3 words), 'The Lucinda Williams song bled through the wall.' (8 words), 'The radiator clanked.' (3 words) — all 12 words or fewer, rendering sound bleed and time pressure. Initial panic compression at chapters/chapter_11.md:29: Caleb-lacks enumeration reduced from 6 items to 3 ('He did not have a body. He did not have an apartment in Portland or a dog named Bruno.') before pivoting to the doorbell image. Google Maps/Alberta Arts district detail cut.
finding_results.notes: The bathroom scene now reads as a sprint: staccato environmental beats (sound through wall, radiator) punctuate the technical procedure. The AI-autonomy insight ('Simone's creation's creation') is preserved in compressed form. The initial panic enumeration moves faster from the inventory of what Caleb lacks to the visceral consequence — ringing a doorbell no one answers. Both scenes now match the stated time pressure (forty-five seconds, three minutes) with compressed prose rhythm rather than contradicting it with measured expansion.

pass_summaries.summary: All three findings addressed. CH11-PROSE-01 (HIGH): cut 17 of 18 formula-pattern instances of 'particular'/'specific', reducing combined count from 18 to 1 (plus 2 non-formula predicate-adjective uses). CH11-CRAFT-01 (MEDIUM): removed explicit thematic analysis from 2 of 3 cited passages; the bathroom-stall reflection and aimed-wound paragraphs now end on scene evidence rather than stated thesis; the forgiveness chain retained as single allowed analysis. CH11-CRAFT-02 (MEDIUM): compressed bathroom AI-autonomy digression from 3 paragraphs to 2 sentences and added 3 short physical-urgency sentences; compressed initial-panic Caleb enumeration from 6 items to 3 and cut the Google Maps digression. Heading contract preserved (# Chapter 11). No continuity contradictions introduced. Character voice and dialogue register unchanged.
